name: objection-destroyer
description: Universal sales objection handling system. Real-time classification, response generation, practice drilling, and win-rate tracking across all industries.
author: KOINO Capital

commands.destroy: Classify and respond to an objection in real-time
commands.drill: Practice mode — random objection scenarios, timed responses
commands.analyze: Analyze a conversation transcript for objection patterns
commands.library: Browse objection database by industry and type
commands.score: Track and report win rates by objection type and framework
commands.preempt: Generate preemptive objection handling for a pitch
